evidence_interpretation.outer_curve: SPARC Rotmod supports a flat outer radial rotation curve, so the mismatch should not be dismissed as obviously non-flat from this artifact alone.
evidence_interpretation.failed_stalled: Scalar gas-rich, low-stellar, diffuse/H I-extended, and severe-underrotation flags support the M29 failed/stalled classification.
evidence_interpretation.missing_decisive_evidence: No 2D H I velocity-field map, H I surface-density map, SFR/depletion time, stellar-population constraint, or environment/tidal audit was ingested.

claim_boundary: UGC07125 remains provisional: scalar evidence supports failed/stalled triage, but nonparticipating gas is not established and true-falsifier language is premature without resolved H I map/geometry evidence.
